home.tagline: What you ordered is what you get.
home.subtitle: Share your measurements, photos, and fit notes with your tailor in one link.
home.feedback: Got feedback? Tell us on WhatsApp

nudge.guest: Add your body photo and measurements below. When you save, we will create your profile.
nudge.missingBoth: Add your body photo and measurements below so your tailor has everything they need when you place an order.
nudge.missingPhoto: Looking good! Add a body photo so your tailor can see your build.
nudge.missingMeasurements: Almost there! Add your measurements to complete your profile.

bodyPhoto.description: Add one photo so your tailor can see your body profile Ã¢ÂÂ how you carry weight, your posture, and your build. This is separate from the reference images you attach to each order.

orders.empty: No orders yet. Tap New Order to get something made.

nameStep.title: What's your name?
nameStep.subtitle: We will create your profile so your work is saved.

usernameStep.title: Choose a username
usernameStep.subtitle: This is how you will log in on any device.
usernameStep.takenError: That username is taken. Please try another.

pinStep.title: Set a PIN
pinStep.subtitle: You will use this with your username to log in on other devices.

recovery.title: Suruwe
recovery.tagline: What you ordered is what you get.
recovery.subtitle: Enter your username and PIN to access your profile on this device.
recovery.error: No profile found with that username and PIN. Please check and try again.

pinSetup.title: Secure your profile
pinSetup.subtitle: Set a 4 to 6 digit PIN so you can access your profile on other devices.

usernameSetup.title: Choose a username
usernameSetup.subtitle: Pick a username so you can log in on any device with just your username and PIN.
usernameSetup.takenError: That username is taken. Please try another.

shareSuruwe.heading: What you ordered vs what you got.
shareSuruwe.message: You know that feeling when you send your tailor a photo and what comes back looks nothing like it? I started using Suruwe to send my measurements, photos, and fit notes in one link. No more wahala. Try it:

step2.title: Fit notes and reference images
step2.fitNotesPlaceholder:
e.g.
- Slim fit, not too tight around the arms
- Leave extra room in the chest
- Knee length
step2.fitNotesHint: Use dashes or numbers for a list. Line breaks will be preserved.

step3.staleBanner: Your measurements were last updated {date}. Want to update before sending?
step3.emptySubtitle: Your tailor needs these to get the fit right. You only have to do this once.

step4.title: Review and send
step4.noPhotoWarning: You have not added a photo of yourself yet. A photo helps your tailor see your frame and get the fit right.

sent.title: Order sent!
sent.description: Your order for {description} has been sent{tailor} via WhatsApp.
sent.sharePrompt: Know someone who struggles with getting clothes made the way they want?
sent.feedbackPrompt: This is new. One thing that would make it better?

orderDetail.deleteConfirmText: Delete this order? This cannot be undone.
orderDetail.completedSubtitle: Add a photo of the finished garment and a note on how the fit turned out. This builds your fit history over time.
orderDetail.completedNotePlaceholder: How did the fit turn out? What worked, what needed adjusting...
orderDetail.addCompletedPhoto: Got your piece? Add a photo of the finished work.

phonePrompt.title: Add your phone number
phonePrompt.subtitle: So you can always access your Suruwe profile from any device. We will send you a link via WhatsApp.

tailorView.notFoundDesc: This measurement profile does not exist or may have moved.
